pages.title: Minimizing HALTED States
pages.text: $(bold)Problem$(): PreFab enters HALTED frequently$(br2)$(bold)Solutions$():$(br2)$(bold)1. Larger buffers$(): $(li)Use Barrels instead of chests (64 stacks vs. 27 stacks) $(li)Use Storage Drawers (massive capacity)$(br2)$(bold)2. Balanced rates$(): $(li)Match input supply rate to factory consumption $(li)Example: Factory uses 1 coal/tick → Supply chest needs 1200 coal/minute$(br2)$(bold)3. Monitoring systems$(): $(li)Use comparators to detect low chest levels $(li)Automate restocking (hoppers, pipes)

pages.title: Reducing Tick Lag
pages.text: $(bold)PreFab tick cost$(): $(li)CACHED mode: ~0.01ms per PreFab (negligible) $(li)SIMULATING mode: Same as running real factory (high)$(br2)$(bold)Optimization$(): $(li)Keep PreFabs in CACHED as much as possible $(li)Don't re-simulate unless necessary (rates don't change often) $(li)Avoid having many PreFabs in SIMULATING simultaneously

pages.title: Chunk Loading Management
pages.text: $(bold)Strategy$(): $(li)Group PreFabs in same chunks (reduces total chunks loaded) $(li)Use chunk loaders sparingly (PreFabs in CACHED do not need loaded chunks)$(br2)---
